en: This is the biggest house in the neighborhood.
You are the biggest surprise in my life.
My cat is the smartest person in the house.
I'm playing with the smallest dog in the garden.

tr: Ali bizim sınıftaki en uzun boylu öğrenci.
en: Ali is the tallest student in our class.
I'm sleeping in the most comfortable bed in the house.

tr: Dünyadaki en pahalı arabayı sürmek ister misin?
en: Do you want to drive the most expensive car in the world?

tr: Dünyadaki en kısa boylu kadın Almanya'da yaşıyor.
en: The shortest woman in the world lives in Germany.

tr: Dünyadaki en uzun boylu basketbolcu Kerim Abdülcabbar'dır.
en: The tallest basketball player in the world is Kerim Abdülcabbar.

tr: Dünyadaki en sağlıklı besinleri yemek istiyorum.
en: I want to eat the healthiest foods in the world.

tr: Bizim mahalledeki en yeni evde yaşıyoruz.
en: We are living in the newest house in our neighborhood.
I'm playing with the oldest cat in the garden.

tr: Bizim evdeki en eski halı bu.
en: This is the oldest carpet in our house.

tr: Bizim köydeki en yaşlı adamla Atatürk hakkında konuşmak istiyorum.
en: I want to talk about Ataturk with the oldest man in our village.
The most expensive houses in Turkey are in Istanbul.
The cheapest breakfast in Istanbul is here.
The coldest city of Turkey is Hakkari.

tr: Dolaptaki en soğuk kolayı içmek istiyorum.
en: I want to drink the coldest cola in the fridge.

tr: Türkiye'nin en sıcak ili Antalya mıdır?
en: Is Antalya the hottest city of Turkey?
The most beautiful girl in the school is Ayse.
These are the easiest questions in the exam.

tr: Hayatımdaki en zor günün ardından buradayım.
en: I'm here after the hardest day of my life.
The earliest train is at 9 o'clock.
The latest bus is at 3 a.m.

tr: Bu, hayatımın en hafif akşam yemeği.
en: This is the lightest dinner of my life.
Ali is the strongest student in the school.

tr: Evdeki en yumuşak yastık başımın altında.
en: The softest pillow in the house is under my head.
Which one is the most powerful country in the world?
Which one is the fastest animal in the world?
Who is the richest man of Turkey?
Which one is the poorest country of the world?
Who is the funniest person in your house?
Who is the most fun person in your house?

tr: Sizin sınıftaki en şapşal öğrenci kim?
en: Who is the silliest student in your class?
I'm among the smartest students in the school.
The highest mountain in the world is Everest.
The longest river in the world is the Nile.

tr: Dünyadaki en sağlıklı insanlar Japonya'da yaşıyor.
en: The healthiest people in the world live in Japan.
He is the most dangerous man in the country.

tr: Evim, benim için dünyadaki en güvenli yerdir.
en: My house is the safest place in the world for me.
The cleanest shirt is mine.
The dirtiest socks are yours.

tr: Bu toplantıda Türkiye'nin en önemli sorunları hakkında konuşmak istiyoruz.
en: We want to talk about the most important problems of Turkey in this meeting.

tr: Bizim sınıftaki en tertipli öğrenci sensin.
en: You are the tidiest student in our class.

tr: Dünyadaki en mutlu insanlar Finlandiya'da yaşıyorlar.
en: The happiest people in the world live in Finland.
This is the most boring movie in my life.

tr: Benim için dünyadaki en önemli şey ailemdir.
en: The most important thing in the world for me is my family.
We are living the most ordinary life in the world.
I'm the most tired person among you.

tr: İstanbul dünyadaki en yoğun trafiğe sahiptir.
en: Istanbul has the busiest traffic in the world.
I'm in the busiest period of my career.
Ali is my closest friend.
Ayse is my smartest friend.
The fastest car in the world is Porsche.
The slowest animal in the world is the turtle.

tr: İstanbul dünyadaki en kalabalık şehirlerden biridir.
en: Istanbul is one of the most crowded cities in the world.
The earliest train is at 6 o'clock.
The greenest city in the world is Rize.
This is the darkest moment of my life.

tr: Hayatımın en mutlu anında sizinle beraberim.
en: I'm with you at the happiest moment of my life.
What is the healthiest food in the fridge?

tr: En uzun gecenin ardından daha güçlüyüm.
en: I'm stronger after the longest night.

tr: En kısa günün sabahında daha yorgunum.
en: I'm more tired in the morning of the shortest day.
